questions.question: What's the only U.S. state never to have banned prostitution?
What quartet dressed up as The Bat Lizard, Star Child, Space Man and The Cat?
Who promised Hitler he'd commit his troops when Germany's attack on France proved successful?
What dog's name was changed to the St. Francis terrier to enhance its image?
What automatic weapon was once marketed as "the ideal weapon for the protection of large estates, ranches, plantations, etc."?
questions.answer: The Tommy Gun, or Thompson Submachine

questions.question: What did the French call the English disease and the English call the French disease?
